steps.title: Spot the defining task
steps.content: The explicit goal is to “provide a specific example of an isthmus” — not define it or describe it vaguely, but name a labeled example.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
C directly accomplishes the goal by explicitly stating “One example of an isthmus is the Isthmus of Potidea in Greece,” — this phrasing both labels and names the example.

A and B describe geographic details without identifying them as exemplifying the concept, while D provides the definition instead of an example.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
